SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2025 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-26-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CASE IS CONTINUED PENDING DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT BY THE PARTIES. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MICHELLE A VARNADO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN GERBER AND CHRISTINE LUBY ARE PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 REMARKS: NO ANSWER AT THE TIME OF SERVICE. THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARNADO, MICHELLE A AS TO DEFENDANT SHALEK, NICK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VARNADO, MICHELLE A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GERBER, JOHN LUBY, CHRISTINE JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANTS V PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE A. VARNADO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN GERBER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTINE LUBY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICK SHALEK IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON NICK SHALEK. THE PLAINTIFF DISMISSES THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT NICK SHALEK TO HEAR THE MATTER TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 05, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER TO JOHN GERBER RETURN TO SENDER - VACANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
